baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Fix this React TypeScript error in a Bun/Biome project.
evals.expected_output: A strict TypeScript fix that follows package-local Bun and Biome conventions and validates with repo scripts.
assertions: Preserves strict typing and avoids any unless already permitted.
Runs typecheck, test, check, or build as relevant.
